title: Entomancer

moves.title: Pheromone Spit
effects: If Personal Hive < 3 stacks: Gain 1 Personal Hive, Apply 1 Strength to self
If Personal Hive >= 3 stacks: Apply 2 Strength to self

move_pattern: Starts with Beeeees!, then cycles: Beeeees! → Spear! → Pheromone Spit → (repeat)
notes: Spawns with 1 stack of Personal Hive. Pheromone Spit changes behavior based on Personal Hive stacks: below 3 stacks it gains 1 more Personal Hive and 1 Strength; at 3 or more stacks it gains 2 Strength instead. This means it steadily accumulates Strength across multiple Pheromone Spit uses, making its Beeeees! and Spear! attacks hit progressively harder.
